firms.scope_includes: Enterprise generative AI software and services, AI infrastructure CapEx by hyperscalers, AI chip revenue
firms.scope_excludes: Traditional analytics and ML tools, AI-adjacent software without generative components

firms.scope_includes: AI software companies (SaaS, API), AI infrastructure providers, AI hardware — based on funding and revenue data from private and public companies
firms.scope_excludes: Consumer AI embedded products, large diversified tech companies counted on full revenue basis

firms.scope_includes: AI hardware, software, services, by deployment (on-premise + cloud), all industry verticals
All AI-adjacent technology spending including general IT infrastructure, AI hardware, software, services, and AI-enabled devices
firms.scope_excludes: Nothing explicitly excluded — broadest published definition

firms.scope_includes: Generative AI infrastructure (GPU compute), GenAI software, AI services — focused on generative AI subset
firms.scope_excludes: Traditional ML/AI software pre-dating LLM era, enterprise AI tools not using generative models

firms.scope_includes: AI software platforms, machine learning, natural language processing, computer vision — narrow software focus
firms.scope_excludes: AI-specific hardware (GPUs, TPUs), cloud infrastructure CapEx dedicated to AI — narrower than our scope

firms.scope_includes: Enterprise AI software, IT infrastructure dedicated to AI, and AI services/consulting
firms.scope_excludes: Consumer AI applications, general IT infrastructure not AI-specific, AI hardware (chips)

firms.scope_includes: AI hardware, software, services across enterprise, cloud, and on-premise deployments
firms.scope_excludes: General IT not AI-specific, consumer AI devices

firms.scope_includes: Generative AI economic value across all sectors including productivity gains, AI-enabled output, and technology spend
firms.scope_excludes: Nothing — includes both direct technology spend AND broader economic value creation (much broader than market size)

firms.scope_includes: AI software, AI hardware, AI services, enterprise AI platforms, cloud AI infrastructure
firms.scope_excludes: General IT infrastructure not dedicated to AI

firms.scope_includes: Enterprise AI software, AI services, AI hardware — aggregates multiple vendor surveys
firms.scope_excludes: Pure cloud infrastructure CapEx, some emerging market segments — varies by edition
